title: Set timeline based on date and time calculated with duration
excerpt: HI, is there is a way to add hours and minutes to the date which will allow to do calculation between dates?

posts.author: avnor100 (Yaniv Avnor)
posts.cookedHtml: HI, is there is a way to add hours and minutes to the date which will allow to do calculation between dates?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Yaniv! If you’re looking for time down to the minutes, have you considered using Time Tracking Columns in lieu of Date Columns? Then, you can subtract one Time Tracking Column from another in a Formula Column to find the time between them.

If this doesn’t quite answer your question, I’d love to know more about what kind of calculation you’re looking to do!
